originalTitle: Warren Buffett Looks for Value in Today’s Market But Comes Up Empty: ‘Everybody Is Preferring Gambling’
summary: Legendary investor Warren Buffett is no longer the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc, but remains active as Executive Chairman at providing investment ideas for the conglomerate and new CEO Greg Abel. These days, Buffett says its tough to find value...
content:
Benzinga and Yahoo Finance LLC may earn commission or revenue on some items through the links below.

Legendary investor Warren Buffett is no longer the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc , but remains active as Executive Chairman at providing investment ideas for the conglomerate and new CEO Greg Abel . These days, Buffett says its tough to find value in the stock market.

Berkshire Hathaway underperformed the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust , which tracks the S&P 500, in 2025. The underperformance could continue in 2026 with Berkshire Hathaway sitting on a cash and short-term investment holding balance nearing $400 billion.

A single bad hire can set a startup back years. Here are the 5 hires founders most often misjudge — and why

Still Learning the Market? These 50 Must-Know Terms Can Help You Catch Up Fast

That $397 billion continues to sit on the sidelines as stocks hit record highs across many sectors.

Buffett said he fails to see value in many investments and thinks the stock market is getting closer to a casino.

"It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling," Buffett told CNBC Wednesday.

The legendary investor said the market today is driven more by speculative trading and not long-term investing.

"There are times when opportunities are just thrown at you so fast you can't, you know, it's unbelievable. There's other times when you're very, very lucky if you find one thing in a couple of years. And it should always be that the, the latter is what prevails."

Buffett said that humans like to gamble, which means there's more money in "cultivating gamblers than there are cultivating investors."

Trending: Avoid the #1 Investing Mistake: How Your 'Safe' Holdings Could Be Costing You Big Time

In the first quarter, Berkshire Hathaway took new positions in three stocks, believing there was value upside in companies like Delta Air Lines, Alphabet and Macy's. The company also sold off many old positions and took the overall investment portfolio from 42 positions to 29.

The company's continued bet on holding cash and looking for value has the stock underperforming (-1.4%) against the S&P 500 (+10.0%) once again in 2026.

Buffett has become more outspoken about the recent stock market trends and shifting investor appetite.

In May, he compared the stock market to "a church with a casino attached." The legendary investor was critical of new investment instruments like one-day options, which he called "gambling" rather than investing.

Back in 2021, Buffett was critical of the role that online brokerages like Robinhood Global were having on changes to investing.

"Robinhood has become a very significant part of the casino aspect of the casino group that has joined into the stock market in the last year or year and a half," Buffett said at the time.

See Also: Skip the Regrets: The Essential Retirement Tips Experts Wish Everyone Knew Earlier.

Buffett said what Robinhood is doing isn't immoral or illegal but cautioned that it is capitalizing on investors who are gambling on the stock market.

"I think the degree to which a very rich society can reward people who know how to take advantage, essentially, of the gambling instincts of the American public, the worldwide public — it's not the most admirable part of the accomplishment."

Whether Buffett's value discipline pays off again — or leaves Berkshire trailing a momentum-driven market — remains the open question for the rest of 2026.

Photo Courtesy: Photo Agency on Shutterstock.com

Building Wealth Across More Than Just the Market

Building a resilient portfolio means thinking beyond a single asset or market trend. Economic cycles shift, sectors rise and fall, and no one investment performs well in every environment. That's why many investors look to diversify with platforms that provide access to real estate, fixed-income opportunities, precious metals, and even self-directed retirement accounts. By spreading exposure across multiple asset classes, it becomes easier to manage risk, capture steady returns, and create long-term wealth that isn't tied to the fortunes of just one company or industry.

Backed by Jeff Bezos, Arrived Homes makes real estate investing accessible with a low barrier to entry. Investors can buy fractional shares of single-family rentals and vacation homes starting with as little as $100 . This allows everyday investors to diversify into real estate, collect rental income, and build long-term wealth without needing to manage properties directly.

Institutional-quality real estate has traditionally been difficult for individual investors to access. Realberry gives accredited investors direct access to private real estate opportunities backed by a team with 35 years of experience, $3.4 billion in assets under management, and $481 million in cumulative distributions paid to investors as of Q4 2025, according to the company. With a portfolio spanning 13 million square feet across seven U.S. states, Realberry focuses on acquiring, developing, and managing real estate with an emphasis on long-term value creation while its principals often invest alongside clients to help align interests.

Farmland has historically held its value through market volatility and delivered returns uncorrelated to stocks and bonds. For accredited investors, FarmTogether offers direct access to high-quality U.S. farmland starting at $15,000 — fully managed, with no landlord headaches.

Immersed is building technology for the future of work through spatial computing. Known for its AR/VR productivity platform that enables users to work across multiple virtual screens, the company has grown to more than 1.5 million users worldwide. chineseTitle: 沃伦·巴菲特在当今市场中寻找价值，但却一无所获：“每个人都更喜欢赌博”
chineseSummary: 传奇投资家沃伦·巴菲特不再担任伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司首席执行官，但仍积极担任执行董事长，为该集团和新任首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔提供投资理念。如今，巴菲特表示很难找到价值......
chineseContent:
Benzinga 和 Yahoo Finance LLC 可能通过以下链接赚取某些项目的佣金或收入。

传奇投资家沃伦·巴菲特不再担任伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司首席执行官，但仍然积极担任执行董事长，为该集团和新任首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔提供投资理念。如今，巴菲特表示很难在股​​市中找到价值。

2025 年，伯克希尔哈撒韦公司的表现落后于追踪标准普尔 500 指数的 SPDR S&P 500 ETF 信托基金。由于伯克希尔哈撒韦公司持有的现金和短期投资余额接近 4000 亿美元，2026 年表现可能会继续不佳。

一次糟糕的招聘可能会让一家初创企业倒退数年。以下是创始人最常误判的 5 名员工——以及原因

还在学习市场吗？这 50 个必须知道的术语可以帮助您快速跟上

随着许多行业的股市创下历史新高，这 3,970 亿美元仍然处于观望状态。

巴菲特表示，他看不到许多投资的价值，并认为股市越来越接近赌场。

巴菲特周三对 CNBC 表示：“当每个人都喜欢赌博时，很难找到价值。”

这位传奇投资者表示，当今的市场更多地是由投机交易而非长期投资驱动的。

“有时候，机会就这么快地降临到你身上，你知道，这令人难以置信。也有一些时候，如果你在几年内找到一件事，你就非常非常幸运。而且应该永远是后者才是最重要的。”

巴菲特说，人类喜欢赌博，这意味着“培养赌徒比培养投资者赚的钱更多”。

趋势：避免第一大投资错误：你的“安全”持仓可能会让你付出巨大的代价

第一季度，伯克希尔哈撒韦公司增持了三只股票，认为达美航空、Alphabet 和梅西百货等公司的价值有上涨空间。该公司还出售了许多旧仓位，并将整体投资组合从 42 个仓位减少到 29 个。

该公司继续押注持有现金并寻找价值，导致该股在 2026 年的表现再次逊于标准普尔 500 指数（+10.0%）（-1.4%）。

巴菲特对最近的股市趋势和投资者兴趣的转变变得更加直言不讳。

五月，他将股市比作“附有赌场的教堂”。这位传奇投资者对一日期权等新投资工具持批评态度，他称其为“赌博”而不是投资。

早在 2021 年，巴菲特就对 Robinhood Global 等在线经纪公司在投资变革中所扮演的角色提出了批评。

巴菲特当时表示：“罗宾汉已经成为赌场集团在过去一年或一年半进入股市的赌场方面非常重要的一部分。”

另请参阅：跳过遗憾：专家希望每个人都早点知道的基本退休技巧。

巴菲特表示，Robinhood 的行为并非不道德或非法，但警告说，它正在利用在股市赌博的投资者。

“我认为一个非常富裕的社会可以在多大程度上奖励那些知道如何利用美国公众和全世界公众的赌博本能的人——这并不是成就中最令人钦佩的部分。”

巴菲特的价值纪律是否再次获得回报——或者让伯克希尔落后于动量驱动的市场——在 2026 年剩余时间里仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。

图片来源：Shutterstock.com 上的图片代理机构

继续阅读：您认为您为孩子存的钱足够了吗？你可能会陷入危险——看看为什么

不仅仅在市场上创造财富

建立有弹性的投资组合意味着超越单一资产或市场趋势的思维。经济周期发生变化，行业兴衰，没有一项投资在所有环境下都能表现良好。这就是为什么许多投资者希望通过提供房地产、固定收益机会、贵金属甚至自我管理退休账户的平台来实现多元化。通过将风险分散到多个资产类别，可以更轻松地管理风险、获得稳定的回报并创造不只与一家公司或行业的命运挂钩的长期财富。

在杰夫·贝索斯 (Jeff Bezos) 的支持下，Arrived Homes 使房地产投资变得更容易，进入门槛较低。投资者只需 100 美元即可购买单户出租屋和度假屋的部分股份。这使得日常投资者能够多元化投资房地产、收取租金收入并建立长期财富，而无需直接管理房产。

传统上，个人投资者很难获得机构品质的房地产。据该公司称，Realberry 为合格投资者提供了直接获得私人房地产机会的机会，该团队由拥有 35 年经验的团队提供支持，管理着 34 亿美元的资产，截至 2025 年第四季度向投资者支付的累计分配额为 4.81 亿美元。 Realberry 的投资组合横跨美国七个州，面积达 1300 万平方英尺，专注于收购、开发和管理房地产，强调长期价值创造，而其负责人经常与客户一起投资，以帮助协调利益。

农田历来在市场波动中保持其价值，并提供与股票和债券无关的回报。对于经过认证的投资者来说，FarmTogether 可以直接购买高质量的美国农田，起价为 15,000 美元——完全管理，没有房东的麻烦。

Immersed 正在通过空间计算构建未来工作的技术。该公司以其 AR/VR 生产力平台而闻名，该平台使用户能够跨多个虚拟屏幕工作，全球用户数量已超过 150 万。 Immersed 还在开发 Visor，这是一款专为专业生产力而设计的轻型耳机，使该公司处于远程工作、扩展现实 (XR) 和下一代计算的交叉点。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
